description:
Job Description
 



 Skills:

title: Bare Metal Platform Engineer
description:
**The Role** 




 Ever wondered what goes on under the hood when you spin up a container or instance on a cloud provider? We're seeking a motivated software developer with curiosity for infrastructure automation. You'll be tasked with building the core system that will power our infrastructure platform. In addition to creating the ideal developer experience for companies trying to run their applications you'll develop the software layer that transforms our physical infrastructure into programmable resources. 
 



**Key Responsibilities** 



* Design and develop RESTful APIs that enable programmatic control of our infrastructure
* Build automation systems to manage the lifecycle of physical servers
* Create control plane software to handle provisioning, networking, and resource management
* Implement software that simplifies complex infrastructure tasks for customers
* Develop integration points between our platform and customer deployment tools



**Technical Requirements** 



* Strong software development skills in a systems language (Go, Rust, Python, Java)
* Experience building and designing APIs and service\\-oriented architectures
* Knowledge of infrastructure components (Storage, BIOS, BMC, NIC)
* Familiarity with containerization and orchestration concepts (Docker, Kubernetes)
* Understanding of authentication, authorization, and API security



**What Sets You Apart** 



* Previous experience developing infrastructure management software
* Knowledge of infrastructure\\-as\\-code principles and implementations (Terraform)
* Background in designing developer\\-friendly interfaces and workflows
* Experience with Redfish/IPMI/PXE



**What We Offer** 



* Salary Range \\= $100,000 \\- $180,000 \\+ Equity
* Health insurance coverage
* Opportunity to solve challenging problems with modern approaches



 We're focused on building software that makes infrastructure easy to use without sacrificing power or flexibility. If you're excited about creating systems that bridge the gap between raw hardware and intuitive developer experiences, join us in reshaping how businesses deploy and manage infrastructure.
 





### About Rackdog:




 Rackdog provides bare metal and virtual server solutions for businesses to scale their applications reliably, affordably, and globally. We're transforming into an engineering\\-first company focused on building software that makes infrastructure simple and intuitive. Our mission is to develop a platform that delivers the power of bare metal with the ease of use customers expect from modern cloud services.

As a new hire on the Bank Modernization teams within Bank Tech, you will contribute to the design and development of key components within this new core platform. title: Assistant Project Manager
description:
Job description
 



**Overview** 
  

 We are seeking a motivated and detail\\-oriented Project Assistant to support our project management team in the successful execution of Lighting Industry projects. The ideal candidate will possess a strong understanding of project coordination and construction management, with proficiency in relevant software tools. This role is essential in ensuring that projects are completed on time, within scope, and to the highest quality standards.
 



**Duties** 



* Assist in the coordination and management of Lighting projects from inception to completion.
* Utilize construction management software to track project progress and maintain documentation.
* Collaborate with project managers to develop and update project schedules using .
* Prepare and review schematics and blueprints to ensure alignment with project requirements.
* Support the estimation process by gathering necessary data for construction estimating.
* Maintain clear communication with team members, subcontractors, and clients on project updates and timelines.
* Organize project meetings, take minutes, and follow up on action items to ensure accountability.
* Monitor project timelines and assist in time management to prevent delays.
* Conduct site visits to assess progress and address any issues that may arise on the construction site.



**Qualifications** 



* Experience or coursework in project management or a related field is preferred.
* Familiarity with construction management software such as is highly desirable.
* Strong organizational skills with an emphasis on project coordination.
* Ability to read and interpret construction schematics effectively.
* Excellent time management skills to handle multiple tasks efficiently.
* Knowledge of construction estimating processes is a plus.
* Strong communication skills, both verbal and written, for effective collaboration with team members and stakeholders.
* A proactive approach to problem\\-solving and attention to detail.



 If you are passionate about supporting construction projects and eager to contribute to a dynamic team environment, we encourage you to apply for this exciting opportunity as a Project Assistant.
 



 Job Type: Full\\-time
 



 Pay: From $28\\.00 per hour
 



 Expected hours: 40 per week
 



 Schedule:
 



  
 


* 8 hour shift



  
 



 Ability to Commute:
 



  
 


* Brooklyn, NY 11233 (Required)



  
 



 Ability to Relocate:
 



  
 


* Brooklyn, NY 11233: Relocate before starting work (Required)



  
 



 Work Location: In person
 





### About Prestige Lighting:




 Prestige Lighting is an authorized and premier distributor of advanced lighting fixtures, lighting controls, and smart technologies, offering products from the industry’s leading national and international brands. Based in Brooklyn, NY, we are equipped with an expert team specializing in lighting specifications, lighting controls and smart technology, as well as a dedicated tech support team that can assist with everything from wiring diagrams to integrating smart controls tailored to your project’s lighting and technology needs. Our additional facilities, spanning over 150,000 s/f in West Haven, CT, allow us to be one of the most trusted names in lighting distribution, specializing in residential, industrial, and commercial projects. With our extensive inventory and reliable delivery systems, we are especially well prepared to manage large\\-scale projects without relying on drop shipping, providing the flexibility to handle on\\-demand deliveries and inventory storage.
   

  

 At Prestige Lighting, we take pride in offering not only beautiful, high\\-quality lighting fixtures but also cutting\\-edge lighting controls and smart technologies with an emphasis on functionality and sustainability. We stay ahead of market trends by providing state\\-of\\-the\\-art solutions for all lighting and controls requirements, ensuring that we meet the diverse needs of our clients. Whether it’s an advanced lighting automation system or the latest in energy\\-saving technologies, we offer solutions to fit every budget.
   

  

 We serve a wide range of projects, including new construction, building renovations, and facility maintenance. Our diverse clientele includes developers, general contractors, electrical contractors, architects, designers, decorators, and homeowners.
   

  

 Customer satisfaction is at the heart of everything we do. Our repeat customers and strong recommendations are a testament to our exceptional service. We collaborate closely with clients to understand their specific needs and provide personalized solutions incorporating the latest in lighting and smart technologies. Our knowledgeable in\\-house sales team is always available to assist, ensuring a seamless, hassle\\-free experience and the highest level of satisfaction.
   

  

 Our core values drive our business and guide us in everything we do. We hold ourselves to the highest ethical standards and personal integrity, ensuring that we consistently deliver products and services of the highest quality. At Prestige Lighting, we are committed to advancing the future of lighting through innovation and smart technologies that enhance the way we live and work.

title: Applied Science Engineer Intern (Summer 2025)
description:
**Thornton Tomasetti** 
 applies engineering and scientific principles to solve the world's challenges. We provide support and opportunities to our employees to achieve their full potential and cultivate a rewarding career.
   

  

 Our
 **Applied Science**

We apply expertise in solid and fluid dynamics, materials science, acoustics, risk assessments, and computational simulation methods to solve complex problems. We perform research, mathematical modeling, software development, and design to manage risks to life safety in military platforms and installations, ships and submarines, critical infrastructure, tall buildings, public facilities, industrial and petrochemical plants, and automotive and airborne vehicles. Military, government, corporate, and academic clients value the validation of Applied Science's software and the critical insights gained from correlating analysis with testing.
   

  

**The Role**

* Undergraduate or graduate student specializing in engineering, applied mechanics, or a related field.

**Compensation** 
  

 The rate for this position generally is $25 \\- $35 hourly. This range is a good faith estimate provided pursuant to the New York Pay Transparency Law. It is based on what a successful New York applicant might be paid and assumes that the successful candidate will be in New York or perform the position from New York. Compensation offers will be based on various factors, including operational needs, individual education, qualifications and experience, work location and comparison to employee already in the role, as well as other considerations permitted by law. A potential new employee's pay history will not be used in compensation decisions.

 Depending on your employment status, benefits may include:

 Pursuant to the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance, we will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records.

**:**

title: Senior/Staff Platform Software Engineer
description:
As a Platform Engineer at Privy, you will help define how we build, deploy, and scale services that power tens of millions of users across thousands of customers\\-all within a rapidly growing engineering team.
   

  

 We believe that platform engineering is where backend engineering meets infrastructure engineering; it's about building the right abstractions, APIs, and developer tools that make shipping code seamless and scalable.
   

  

****What you'll do****
  




* Build and evolve core backend services and API platforms that serve billions of requests per month
* Design and maintain the systems that underpin our engineering velocity\\-deployment pipelines, CI/CD, and internal developer tools
* Lead efforts in observability, performance tuning, and reliability across our stack
* Shape our approach to scaling and securing multi\\-tenant architecture
* Advocate for strategic technical investments, balancing near\\-term shipping speed with long\\-term sustainability
* Design and implement product features end\\-to\\-end, driven by user needs


  

  

****What we're looking for****
  

* Experience building and maintaining a production system at scale
* An understanding of modern API development best practices and design
* Experience in building data models, managing database migrations and best practices, and infrastructure configuration
* Experience writing delightful developer documentation
* As comfortable writing APIs and logic as you are writing infrastructure\\-as\\-code


  

  

****Bonus points if you have...****
  

* Experience with React, Typescript, Next.js, AWS/Terraform, Vercel
* Past experience working in authentication or security


  

  

****Engineering at Privy****
  

  

 Engineering at Privy is not just about writing world\\-class code. We create software that turns complex technical systems into delightful developer tools. We assemble tried\\-and\\-true primitives into intuitive, responsive APIs and beautiful interfaces. We believe in open\\-source work and transparency with our teammates and users. We encourage each other to think big, run experiments and follow our curiosity so we can build better tooling that lets developers shine and empowers their users.
   

  

 Privy is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees, regardless of background, identity, or status.

**Basic Qualifications**

(ABET), with 4 or more years of relevant experience in commercial, industrial, or government facilities construction/maintenance or Masters degree and 2 or more years of relevant experience.**

* Knowledge of  the International Building Codes (IBC) and the National Fire Protection Assoc (NFPA) Codes including NFPA70 \\- National Electric Code.

 NISC IV
